spec.description: Complete CRM web frontend built with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS v3, shadcn/ui components. Connects to the existing NestJS API at /api/v1. Must include auth (JWT), dashboard, contacts CRUD, pipeline kanban, catalog management, agenda calendar, campaigns, activities, notifications. Uses React Query for data fetching, react-hook-form + zod for forms. Dark/light mode with next-themes.

stack.auth: JWT stored in httpOnly cookie or localStorage

pages.name: Login
pages.description: Email + password login form, redirects to dashboard on success

pages.name: Register
pages.description: Registration form with firstName, lastName, email, password

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Stats cards (total contacts, opportunities by stage, conversion rate), recent activity feed, upcoming agenda events

pages.name: Contacts List
pages.description: Table with search, pagination, source filter. Columns: name, email, phone, source, created at

pages.name: Contact Detail
pages.description: Full contact info, linked opportunities list, activity timeline, documents

pages.name: Pipeline Kanban
pages.description: Kanban board with 7 stages. Drag-and-drop to move opportunities. Click to expand details

pages.name: Programs
pages.description: CRUD table for programs, filtered by faculty

pages.name: Cohorts
pages.description: CRUD table for cohorts, filtered by program

pages.name: Agenda
pages.description: Calendar view (month/week/day) with agenda events. Create/edit events modal

pages.name: Campaigns
pages.description: List of marketing campaigns with status badges. Create/edit campaign

pages.name: Activities
pages.description: Filterable activity feed by type, contact, date range

pages.name: Notifications
pages.description: List of in-app notifications with read/unread status, mark as read
